items.claim: John Pork is the superior striker in this matchup.
items.quote: John Pork's going to be the better striker in what should be a kickboxing match.

items.claim: Axel Sola brings high pressure and mental toughness.
items.quote: Axel Sola with the pressure. I know he has dog in him, so I don't have to worry about if things get tough, is he going to break?

items.claim: Bonfim will quit or fold if the fight gets tough.
items.quote: Bonfim, his opponent, will break if things get tough.

items.claim: John Pork is an untested fighter.
Axel Sola is coming off a loss.
items.quote: Axel Sola is tested, he is coming off a loss

items.claim: Thomas Peterson is a wrestler who relies on forward movement and top control.
items.quote: his opponent moves forward, gets his big country boy takedowns and just chills on top

items.claim: Valter Walker is the better wrestler in this matchup.
items.quote: I am trusting that Valter Walker is the better wrestler

items.claim: Valter Walker grew up in Russia wrestling his whole life and has decent takedowns.
items.quote: Valter Walker grew up in Russia. He's been wrestling his whole life. Like he's got decent takedowns.

items.claim: Valter Walker showed a decent chin after getting cracked in his last fight.
items.quote: He also has a decent chin. I watched him get cracked in his last fight.
